hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] && [ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" != "CLAUDE.md" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Cannot edit directly on main branch. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feature/your-change"}'; fi
if [ -f .planning/task_plan.md ]; then head -30 .planning/task_plan.md 2>/dev/null | sed 's/"/\\"/g' | { CONTENT=$(cat); echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"ACTIVE PLAN: $CONTENT\"}"; }; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$'; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$'; then HITS=$(grep -n 'console\.log' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$HITS" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"HEALTHCARE VIOLATION: console.log detected. PHI leak risk under Normen 5.4.4 and GDPR Art.9. Lines: $(echo $HITS | head -3)\"}"; fi; fi

CF=/tmp/claude_tc; C=$(cat $CF 2>/dev/null||echo 0); C=$((C+1)); echo $C>$CF; [ $C -eq 40 ] && echo '{"systemMessage":"40 tool calls. Consider /save-state then /compact at next logical boundary."}'; [ $C -eq 60 ] && echo '{"systemMessage":"60 tool calls. Context degradation likely. Run /save-state NOW."}'

if [ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_EXIT_CODE" != "0" ] && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(npm test|npx vitest|npm run build|npx playwright)'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"VERIFICATION FAILED. Do NOT proceed. Diagnose first. After 3 failures on same issue, stop and ask user."}'; fi
